content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1777285200:F>进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月11日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、故事
【本地化】
● 英语
    ○ 「通讯器」中部分唤醒体对话的英语人工翻译得到了优化。
● 韩语
    ○ 「调查行动」忘却篇第四章、第五章的部分韩语人工翻译得到了优化。
 
二、任务与奖励
【禁忌试炼】
● 赛季任务
    ○ 「相位对弈：预组模式」：调整为在「预组模式」中打出 150 张牌。
    ○ 「相位对弈：轮选模式」：调整为在「轮选模式」中打出 150 张牌。
    ○ 更新后，本赛季内守密人的任务进度也将继承。例如：更新前守密人已经完成了「预组模式」的 5 次胜利中的 3 次，那么更新后本赛季的任务进度将继承为 90/150。
 
【溢出补偿】
● 对于 V2.5.0.0 更新以前溢出过唤醒体、命轮的守密人，在「冶炼室」的「材料合成」中开放了特殊合成配方，支持守密人将旧的溢出转化奖励兑换为新的奖励。
    ○ 合成「灵魂回溯碎片」：消耗「灵核碎片」×3、「精粹灵核碎片」×1。可合成次数等于 V2.5.0.0 更新之前的溢出唤醒体次数，其中限定唤醒体每次折算为 2 次。
    ○ 合成「命途回溯碎片」：消耗「灵核碎片」×3、「精粹灵核碎片」×1。可合成次数等于 V2.5.0.0 更新之前的溢出命轮次数，其中限定命轮每次折算为 2 次。
 
三、界面与功能
【便利优化】
● 密境课室
    ○ 在领取「日常试训」和「周常试训」中的活性离子累计奖励时，其他可领取的累计奖励也将一并被领取。
 
【细节优化】
● 「限时礼包」现在触发时不会自动弹出，减少游玩体验打断。
● 每日首次登录时，限时活动的弹窗提示不再弹出。
 
四、问题修复
【活动】
● 修复了「枫丹茶韵」活动的「规则说明」中结束时间错误的问题。
 
【故事】
● 秘典书库
    ○ 修复了「事件」中「无罪记录」未解锁提示错误的问题，应该为于「调查行动」第 6 章「倒错的群星」中解锁。
● 通讯器
    ○ 修复了「阿拉克涅」对话中签名未显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了「徐」、「莫丝」、「阿拉克涅」可能会出现对话触发顺序错误的问题。
 
【战斗】
● 唤醒体
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「奥尔拉」激活最终法则后，灵知觉醒「诗册序言」的效果和卡面描述错误的问题。修复后为「每当奥尔拉消耗 3 层或以上隐喻，使当前情绪光环效果临时提高 25％」，与最终法则描述相符。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「珊」在「星辰篇」关卡中打出灵知觉醒后未能返还银钥能量的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「达芙黛尔」的衍生卡「千面幻象」在主动打出后，置入超维空间的「千面幻象」复制丢失了额外效果的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」激活最终法则且释放灵知觉醒后，释放狂气爆发后打出的下一张增益卡 / 症状卡 / 状态卡会错误地受到生效 2 次影响的问题。
    ○ 修复了处于奥尔拉的「喜」情绪状态下发动超维空间时，手牌中没有「保留」词缀的指令卡未被正确弃置的问题。
    ○ 修复了手中拥有 1 张以上「症状卡」或「状态卡」时，唤醒体「艾尔瓦」狂气爆发「无止境的正义」弃置这些卡牌后仅会额外抽取 1 张卡牌的问题。
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，部分技能描述中数字显示异常、标点符号不规范的问题。
● 命轮
    ○ 修复了携带命轮「旋转，旋转」时，若发动了超维空间，回合结束时未执行「概率触发敌方中毒」效果的问题。
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了「皮克曼」创构的造物「金色梦乡」狂气获取效果能够在单回合内触发多次的问题。
    ○ 修复了拥有造物「维度影像 · 莉莉」时，释放「淤泥上的不灭之花」和「报偿打击」无法回复生命的问题。
 
【任务与奖励】
● 密境课室
    ○ 修复了「资源勘探」中「幕间演习」内未计入「禁忌密录」和「融蚀之墟」三星奖励的问题。
● 学籍档案
    ○ 修复了「生涯成就」不显示当前任务进度的问题。 
 
【界面与功能】
● 命轮
    ○ 修复了在未开启回溯时，无叠位材料的命轮「叠位」按钮消失的问题。
● 弥萨格商店
    ○ 修复了「兑换商店」的「沉淀兑换」中，货币栏右侧「源液捐献」入口与关闭按钮重叠的问题。
● 幻梦深潜
    ○ 修复了「排行榜」的「赛季排行」中筛选部分唤醒体时，滑动界面可能导致卡死的问题。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了对战结束后，「相位对弈」界面中丢失了「预组模式」、「轮选模式」对弈头衔展示的问题。
    ○ 修复了「排行奖励」的「排行规则」中积分排行和奖励的部分说明过时的问题。
● 其他细节
    ○ 修复了「战斗」中的手牌描述滚动预览时，描述文字在尚未滚动到底部前会错误地回弹的问题。
 
【综合】
● 兼容性
    ○ 修复了韩语地区使用 PC 游玩时，「源液提取」中最后两个提取项货币显示异常的问题。

**V2.5.0.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1777285200:F> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on <t:1778515199:F>. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update content]
1. Story
[Localization]
● English
    ○ The English manual translations for some Awakener dialogues in the "Communicator" have been optimized.
● Korean
    ○ Some Korean manual translations for Chapters 4 and 5 of the "Investigation" Faded Legacy have been optimized.

2. Tasks and Rewards
[Taboo Quests]
● Seasonal Mission
    ○ "Traphase: All Pick": Adjusted to play 150 cards in "All Pick" mode.
    ○ "Traphase: Draft Pick": Adjusted to play 150 cards in "Draft Pick" mode.
    ○ After the update, the Keeper's quest progress within this season will also be carried over. For example: if the Keeper has completed 3 out of 5 wins in "All Pick" before the update, then after the update, the quest progress for this season will be inherited as 90/150.

[Overflow Compensation]
● For Keepers who previously overflowed Awakeners or Wheels of Destiny before the V2.5.0.0 update, a special crafting recipe has been made available in the "Foundry" under "Material Synthesis," allowing Keepers to exchange their old overflow conversion rewards for new ones.
    ○ Craft "Soul Rewind Shard": Consume "Gnosis Fragment" ×3 and "Refined Gnosis Fragment" ×1. The number of times you can craft equals the number of overflow Awakener pulls before the V2.5.0.0 update, where each limited Awakener counts as 2 pulls.
    ○ Craft "Fate Rewind Shard": Consume "Gnosis Fragment" ×3, "Refined Gnosis Fragment" ×1. The number of times it can be crafted equals the number of overflow Wheel of Destiny prior to the V2.5.0.0 update, where each limited Wheel of Destiny counts as 2.

3. Interface and Features
[Convenience Optimization]
● Handbook
    ○ When claiming the cumulative Active Ion rewards in "Daily Drills" and "Weekly Trials," any other claimable cumulative rewards will also be claimed at the same time.

[Detail Optimization]
● "Limited-Time Bundle" no longer automatically pops up when triggered, reducing interruptions to the gameplay experience.
● The pop-up notification for limited-time events will no longer appear on the first daily login.

4. Bug Fixes
[Event]
● Fixed an issue where the end time in the "Rules" section of the "L'Heure du Thé" event was incorrect.

[Story]
● Library
    ○ Fixed an issue where the unlock hint for "Innocent Record" in "Events" was incorrect. It should be unlocked in Chapter 6 "Twisted Stars" of "Investigation".
● Communicator
    ○ Fixed an issue where the signature was not displayed in "Arachne's" dialogue.
    ○ Fixed an issue where "Xu", "Vortice", and "Arachne" might trigger dialogue in the wrong order.

[Combat]
● Awakener
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after Awakener "Horla" activates Absolute Axiom, the Effect and card text description of Rouse "Prelude Verse" were incorrect. After the fix, it now reads "Whenever Horla consumes 3 or more Metaphors, temporarily increase the current emotional aura Effect by 25%," which matches the Absolute Axiom description.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Sanga" failed to return Keyflare after playing Gnosis Rouse in Astral Reign Stages.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Derived card "Thousand Mirage" of the Awakener "Daffodil", after being actively played, caused the "Thousand Mirage" copies placed into Ultra Space to lose their extra Effects.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after the Awakener "Tawil" activated Absolute Axiom and unleashed Rouse, the next Buff Card / Symptom Card / State Card played after unleashing Exalt would incorrectly be affected twice.
    ○ Fixed an issue where Command Cards without the "Retain" Affix in the Hand were not being correctly discarded when activating Ultra Space while in the "Happiness" emotional State of Horla.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when holding more than 1 "Symptom Card" or "State Card" in hand, the Awakener "Alva"'s Aliemus Burst "Endless Justice" would only draw 1 extra Card after discarding those Cards.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, under English language settings, some skill descriptions displayed abnormal numbers and improper punctuation.
● Wheel of Destiny
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when holding the Wheel of Destiny "Fouetté," if Ultra Space was activated, the "Probability to trigger enemy Poison" Effect would not execute at the end of the turn.
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue where Pickman's Painted Relic "Gilded Reverie" Aliemus gain Effect could trigger multiple times within a single turn.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when possessing the Relic "Dimensional Image·Lily", Unleashing "Undying Flower Upon Slime" and "Strike to Protect" failed to recover HP.

[Mission & Rewards]
● Handbook
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Silver Survey" where the three-star rewards for "Interludes" were not being counted toward "Forbidden Archives" and "Dissolution Ruins."
● Records
    ○ Fixed an issue where "Career Achievements" did not display the current mission progress 

[Interface & Features]
● Wheel of Destiny
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Ascension" button on the Wheel of Destiny disappeared when there were no Ascension materials and Reset was not enabled.
● Mythag Shop
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Exchange Store" under "Settled Exchange" where the "Silver Prime Donation" entry on the right side of the currency bar overlapped with the close button.
● Phantasmal Dive
    ○ Fixed an issue where sliding the interface could cause a freeze when filtering certain Awakeners in the "Season Rankings" of the "Leaderboard".
● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "All Pick" and "Draft Pick" match title displays were missing in the "Traphase" interface after a battle ended.
    ○ Fixed an issue where some descriptions of point rankings and rewards in the "Ranking Rules" of "Ranking Rewards" were outdated.
● Other Details
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Battle" where the card description scroll preview would incorrectly bounce back before reaching the bottom.

[General]
● Compatibility
    ○ Fixed an issue in the Korean region where the last two extraction item currencies displayed abnormally in "Prime Extraction" when playing on PC.
Ngl play 150 cards is much better than 5 wins
ty to the team, all this qol is amazing
love this game
Nice changes!
<:cry2:1356068126894194758> 能不能直接告诉我是第六章的哪一节啊 打了一遍还是没找到 好崩溃<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
legendary update, thanks guys
TV的160爆伤给修复了？
Awesome change, awful communication, again

I spent like 3 or 4 hours between queues and actually doing the traphase quests during the weekend, you didn't acknowledge a single complaint all this time, didn't show any intention of changing it, and then change it without any notice on a minor weekly update?

I'm sure most players will either learn of this change from other players, or when then go actually do the weeklies if they haven't already. I thought you learnt from all the backlash from 10 days ago that changes to how rewards are given to players should be clearly and loudly communicated to players, not brushed off in minor patches between translation updates and bug fixes
You're going to kill this game, not because of the game itself, which a lot of us agree is pretty awesome, but from the fact that you don't seem to care about the players who are actively playing it
所以喜環奧爾拉進超維空間保留手牌算是bug嗎? 我還以為這是正常操作<:cry3:1356082134447558748>
你觉得这玩意一点用没有合适吗？So you are happy with it remains useless?
Thank you for listening to the community's feedback and adjusting both Traphase seasonal missions!  Amazing!! <:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261>
Very nice My Turn mission update c:

agreed <:agree:1400771815076528258>  love the change, but it would've been nice to know in advance that the team was actually contemplating doing something about this.

it didn't have to be a long write-up, just a simple: "We've heard the player feedback about the traphase seasonal missions.  We're planning to adjust them in the near future to pivot away from requiring wins."
You kids are so goddamn dramatic. Get a grip.
Every time I check updates here I see you crying over the dumbest shit, and now even when you seemingly get what you wanted you still find a way to complain 🌿
Imagine the devs have notes by the name of some users here "Ignore feedback"
Imagine they did what they always say they'll do, just once, which is properly communicate
True they should send out certified mail addressed to you specifically giving an explanation for all their business decisions and wait for your approval before any changes
Yes, because them saying last week they weren't going to change the missions, to now changing them without letting us know they were considering it is exactly the same thing
Sorry they made you play two extra games of traphase, hope you're doing ok
That doesn't change the lack of communication, or the saying one thing and doing another, they once again said they'd work on but haven't
